nodes.rawBody:
--- index: 1 language: en image_src: /images/design_algorithms.png image_alt: Design and Analysis of Algorithms (DAA) --- ### Design and Analysis of Algorithms (DAA) **2021** This book is written on the general topic of algorithm design and analysis. In this book, the author has introduced the categories and patterns of algorithms and has examined some of the most widely used algorithms in each category.
This book consists of 5 main sections that deal with the design, analysis and types of widely used algorithms.
The author has written this e-book using the following sources: - [CLRS](https://www.amazon.com/Introduction-Algorithms-3rd-MIT-Press/dp/0262033844) - [Algorithms](https://www.amazon.com/Algorithms-4th-Robert-Sedgewick/dp/032157351X) - [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_structure) #### Information - **Author**: [Mohammad Hosein Nemati](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammad-hosein-nemati-665b1813b/) - **Link**: [https://ckdocs.gitlab.io/computer-science/algorithm/](https://ckdocs.gitlab.io/computer-science/algorithm/)

--- index: 0 language: en image_src: /images/data_structures.png image_alt: Data Structures (DSA) --- ### Data Structures (DSA) **2021** This book is written on the general topic of data structure, the author in this book introduces the standard data structure and their types with a detailed description.
This book consists of 12 main sections, each of which deals with one of the types of data structures.
The author has written this e-book using the following sources: - [CLRS](https://www.amazon.com/Introduction-Algorithms-3rd-MIT-Press/dp/0262033844) - [Algorithms](https://www.amazon.com/Algorithms-4th-Robert-Sedgewick/dp/032157351X) - [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_structure) #### Information - **Author**: [Mohammad Hosein Nemati](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammad-hosein-nemati-665b1813b/) - **Link**: [https://ckdocs.gitlab.io/computer-science/data-structure/](https://ckdocs.gitlab.io/computer-science/data-structure/)
